title: Braised Jamaican Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Jamaica, made with tender beef and rich spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown beef in batches until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes per batch.
Remove browned beef from pot, set aside.
Reduce heat to medium, add more oil if necessary.
Add onions and cook until they start to caramelize, about 8 minutes.
Add garlic, scotch bonnet peppers, and cook for 1 minute.
Add stew, salt, black pepper, and brown sugar. Stir to combine.
Return browned beef to pot, bring to a boil.
Cover, transfer to oven, and braise at 300°F (150°C) for 2 1/2 hours, or until beef is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
